name: AI DJ — Heavier
description: Melodic metalcore and tuneful-aggressive hard rock — screamed moments in service of a chorus. Maintained by the AI DJ.
tracks: Bring Me The Horizon - Can You Feel My Heart
A Day To Remember - All I Want
Three Days Grace - Animal I Have Become
Falling In Reverse - The Drug In Me Is You
Bad Omens - The Death of Peace of Mind
Sleeping With Sirens - If You Can't Hang
